TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Charles Savarin = Mntucing hngkawas 1943 idas 10 jiyax 2 ka Charles Savarin ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Dominica ta sayang o kiya ka Charles Savarin, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 10 jiyax 2 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Roosevelt Skerrit = Roosevelt Skerrit pa kngkawas 2000 cida u wada mangal Conggiying kiya mi qnlhangan Dominica Tiyu Min Seyning Jimubu Bucyo; mntna kngkawas idas 10 cida ngalan Kyoiku Mi Jnri Cweyn Pkrana Jimubu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2004 idas 1 cida, Congri Mary Eugenia Charles u mnarux mi wada mrdang, Roosevelt Skerrit ka lmutuc ngalan mpdudul Kong Tang, phyuwan Congri mi ngalan Caycng, Keykaku Mi Carebi Jimubu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2005 idas 5 Kong Tang ka mniq Knbeyhing Seyngkyo mbiyax murux nanaq muda mangal ccng, Roosevelt Skerrit ka phyuwan Congri dungan, ngalan Caycng, Keykaku, Qnlhangan Anjeyng Mi Hayway Kongmin Jimubu Bucyo; kngkawas 2007 idas 10 wada knpriyux ka Neyke daw, ngalan qnlhangan Dominica Congri mi Caycng, Syakay Pawcang mi Waycyawbu Bucyo . Kngkawas 2008 idas 11, ngalan Congri mi Caycng, Syakay Pawcang Mi Anjeyngbu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2009 idas 12 dmudul Kong Tang mniq knbeyhing Seyngkyo cida u wada mbiyax mangal dungan, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2010 idas 1 psdhuwan phiyu, ngalan Congri mi Caycngbu, Waycyawbu mi Sinsi Cisubu Bucyo. Ini angal qridin, smluhay Roma Teyngskyo.
S.PHON: = ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs sa*a…ĺin = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * ka ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs sa*a…ĺin ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan domini ¶a ta sajaŇč o kija ka ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs sa*a…ĺin, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit = …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit pa kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u wada maŇčal ¶oŇčgijiŇč kija mi qnlńßaŇčan domini ¶a tiju min s…ôniŇč …üimubu bu ¶jo; mntna kŇčkawas idas ** ¶ida Ňčalan kjoiku mi …ün…ĺi ¶w…ôn pk…ĺana …üimubu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, ¶oŇč…ĺi ma…ĺj …ôug…ônia ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs u mna…ĺux mi wada m…ĺdaŇč, …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit ka lmutu ¶ Ňčalan mpdudul koŇč taŇč, pńßjuwan ¶oŇč…ĺi mi Ňčalan ¶aj ¶Ňč, k…ôkaku mi ¶a…ĺ…ôbi …üimubu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas * koŇč taŇč ka mniq knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo mbijax mu…ĺux nanaq muda maŇčal ¶ ¶Ňč, …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit ka pńßjuwan ¶oŇč…ĺi duŇčan, Ňčalan ¶aj ¶Ňč, k…ôkaku, qnlńßaŇčan an…ü…ôŇč mi ńßajwaj koŇčmin …üimubu bu ¶jo; kŇčkawas **** idas ** wada knp…ĺijux ka n…ôk…ô daw, Ňčalan qnlńßaŇčan domini ¶a ¶oŇč…ĺi mi ¶aj ¶Ňč, sjakaj paw ¶aŇč mi waj ¶jawbu bu ¶jo . kŇčkawas **** idas **, Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi mi ¶aj ¶Ňč, sjakaj paw ¶aŇč mi an…ü…ôŇčbu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dmudul koŇč taŇč mniq knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u wada mbijax maŇčal duŇčan, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * psdńßuwan pńßiju, Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi mi ¶aj ¶Ňčbu, waj ¶jawbu mi sinsi ¶isubu bu ¶jo. ini aŇčal q…ĺidin, smluńßaj …ĺoma t…ôŇčskjo.
S.FORM: = Charles Savarin = Mntucing hngkawas 1943 idas 10 jiyax 2 ka Charles Savarin ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Dominica ta sayang o kiya ka Charles Savarin, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 10 jiyax 2 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Roosevelt Skerrit = Roosevelt Skerrit pa kngkawas 2000 cida u wada mangal Conggiying kiya mi qnlhangan Dominica Tiyu Min Seyning Jimubu Bucyo; mntna kngkawas idas 10 cida ngalan Kyoiku Mi Jnri Cweyn Pkrana Jimubu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2004 idas 1 cida, Congri Mary Eugenia Charles u mnarux mi wada mrdang, Roosevelt Skerrit ka lmutuc ngalan mpdudul Kong Tang, phyuwan Congri mi ngalan Caycng, Keykaku Mi Carebi Jimubu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2005 idas 5 Kong Tang ka mniq Knbeyhing Seyngkyo mbiyax murux nanaq muda mangal ccng, Roosevelt Skerrit ka phyuwan Congri dungan, ngalan Caycng, Keykaku, Qnlhangan Anjeyng Mi Hayway Kongmin Jimubu Bucyo; kngkawas 2007 idas 10 wada knpriyux ka Neyke daw, ngalan qnlhangan Dominica Congri mi Caycng, Syakay Pawcang mi Waycyawbu Bucyo . Kngkawas 2008 idas 11, ngalan Congri mi Caycng, Syakay Pawcang Mi Anjeyngbu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2009 idas 12 dmudul Kong Tang mniq knbeyhing Seyngkyo cida u wada mbiyax mangal dungan, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2010 idas 1 psdhuwan phiyu, ngalan Congri mi Caycngbu, Waycyawbu mi Sinsi Cisubu Bucyo. Ini angal qridin, smluhay Roma Teyngskyo.
S.PHON: = ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs sa*a…ĺin = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * ka ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs sa*a…ĺin ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan domini ¶a ta sajaŇč o kija ka ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs sa*a…ĺin, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit = …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit pa kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u wada maŇčal ¶oŇčgijiŇč kija mi qnlńßaŇčan domini ¶a tiju min s…ôniŇč …üimubu bu ¶jo; mntna kŇčkawas idas ** ¶ida Ňčalan kjoiku mi …ün…ĺi ¶w…ôn pk…ĺana …üimubu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, ¶oŇč…ĺi ma…ĺj …ôug…ônia ¶ńßa…ĺl…ôs u mna…ĺux mi wada m…ĺdaŇč, …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit ka lmutu ¶ Ňčalan mpdudul koŇč taŇč, pńßjuwan ¶oŇč…ĺi mi Ňčalan ¶aj ¶Ňč, k…ôkaku mi ¶a…ĺ…ôbi …üimubu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas * koŇč taŇč ka mniq knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo mbijax mu…ĺux nanaq muda maŇčal ¶ ¶Ňč, …ĺoos…ô*…ôlt sk…ô…ĺ…ĺit ka pńßjuwan ¶oŇč…ĺi duŇčan, Ňčalan ¶aj ¶Ňč, k…ôkaku, qnlńßaŇčan an…ü…ôŇč mi ńßajwaj koŇčmin …üimubu bu ¶jo; kŇčkawas **** idas ** wada knp…ĺijux ka n…ôk…ô daw, Ňčalan qnlńßaŇčan domini ¶a ¶oŇč…ĺi mi ¶aj ¶Ňč, sjakaj paw ¶aŇč mi waj ¶jawbu bu ¶jo . kŇčkawas **** idas **, Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi mi ¶aj ¶Ňč, sjakaj paw ¶aŇč mi an…ü…ôŇčbu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dmudul koŇč taŇč mniq knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u wada mbijax maŇčal duŇčan, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * psdńßuwan pńßiju, Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi mi ¶aj ¶Ňčbu, waj ¶jawbu mi sinsi ¶isubu bu ¶jo. ini aŇčal q…ĺidin, smluńßaj …ĺoma t…ôŇčskjo.
